package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern build tools and dependencies required for the JHipster 7 stack targeting JDK 11.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build system with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is deprecated and incompatible with the Angular 11 build pipeline required by the new JHipster version.

package.json.general_idea: Migrate frontend framework from AngularJS (1.x) to Angular (11.x).
package.json.why_exists: AngularJS is end-of-life and incompatible with the new JHipster 7 stack which requires Angular 11.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Karma/Jasmine test runner with Jest for unit testing.
package.json.why_exists: Karma configuration is obsolete; the new stack requires Jest integration via @angular-builders/jest.

package.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator dependency to version 7.0.0-beta.0.
package.json.why_exists: Older generator versions do not support the project structure and dependencies required for JDK 11 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated DataStax Java Driver 3.x with the modern DataStax Java Driver 4.x (OSS) to support JDK 11 and current Cassandra protocols.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old driver (com.datastax.cassandra) is incompatible with JDK 11 and relies on removed internal APIs; the new driver (com.datastax.oss) is required for compilation and runtime on JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to use JDK 11 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target configuration, Maven may default to JDK 8 or the host JDK version, causing compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities on JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JIB Maven Plugin to use an AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image for containerization.
pom.xml.why_exists: The previous Dockerfile or JIB configuration likely used JDK 8; updating to JDK 11 base image is required to run the JDK 11 compiled application in containers.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Data Cassandra configuration keys to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames data source properties; using old keys like 'contactPoints' results in configuration not being bound, causing connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Data Cassandra configuration keys to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames data source properties; using old keys like 'keyspaceName' results in configuration not being bound, causing connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Data Cassandra configuration keys to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames data source properties; using old keys like 'protocolVersion' results in configuration not being bound.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring MessageSource configuration key to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames message cache property; using 'cache-seconds' results in configuration not being bound.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration key to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames Thymeleaf mode property; using 'mode' results in configuration not being bound.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot profiles configuration key to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames profiles active property; using 'active' under 'spring.profiles' directly is deprecated/removed in favor of 'spring.profiles.active'.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add JHipster specific configuration properties required for the application to run correctly with the new framework version.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Missing JHipster properties like JWT secret and CORS settings may cause runtime security or configuration errors in the new JHipster version.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Cassandra contact points property to use kebab-case format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x (J11 era) uses kebab-case for property binding; 'contactPoints' (camelCase) is no longer recognized or is deprecated, leading to connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Cassandra keyspace name property to use kebab-case format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x (J11 era) uses kebab-case for property binding; 'keyspaceName' (camelCase) is no longer recognized, leading to connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add local datacenter configuration for Cassandra, which is mandatory in newer Spring Data Cassandra drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer Cassandra drivers require explicit local datacenter configuration to establish connections; missing this causes runtime connection exceptions.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot Actuator configuration from v1.x to v2.x syntax
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x (required for JDK 11) removed the v1.x Actuator properties like 'management.security.enabled' and 'endpoints.jolokia.enabled', causing configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration to Spring Boot 2.x syntax
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed the property path for task execution from 'async.*' to 'spring.task.execution.*', causing the old properties to be ignored.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-cassandra-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration to Spring Boot 2.x syntax
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed the property path for mail configuration from 'mail.*' to 'spring.mail.*', causing the old properties to be ignored.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration to Springdoc OpenAPI syntax
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster migrated from Swagger 2/Springfox to Springdoc OpenAPI for JDK 11/Spring Boot 2.x compatibility, requiring new property structure for API documentation.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterCassandraSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterCassandraSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific application properties
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x requires explicit configuration for JMX, message bundles, and bean overriding which were handled differently or by default in v1.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jmx:
    enabled: false
  messages:
    basename: i18n/messages
  main:
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add server servlet session configuration for Spring Boot 2.x
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moved session configuration under 'server.servlet.session', requiring updates for security settings like http-only cookies.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add management metrics and health probe configuration for Spring Boot 2.x
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x Actuator requires explicit configuration for metrics export (Prometheus) and health probes (liveness/readiness) which were not present or different in v1.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  health:
    group:
      liveness:
        include: livenessState
      readiness:
        include: readinessState
    probes:
      enabled: true
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 60
